message.content:
@startuml
participant "Admin" as Admin1
participant "Employees Module" as EmployeeModule1
participant "Search Index" as SearchIndex1
participant "Database" as Database1

participant "Admin" as Admin2
participant "Employees Module" as EmployeeModule2
participant "Search Index" as SearchIndex2
participant "Database" as Database2

Actor Admin1 as Admin
Actor Admin2 as Admin

rectangle EmployeesModule1
    EmployeesModule1
end rectangle

rectangle EmployeesModule2
    EmployeesModule2
end rectangle

rectangle SearchIndex1
    SearchIndex1
end rectangle

rectangle Database1
    Database1
end rectangle

rectangle SearchIndex2
    SearchIndex2
end rectangle

rectangle Database2
    Database2
end rectangle

Admin1 ..> EmployeeModule1 : trigger task

EmployeeModule1 ..> SearchIndex1 : reset index (delete + create)

EmployeeModule1 ..> Database1 : stream all employees

EmployeeModule2 ..> SearchIndex2 : index employee

EmployeeModule2 ..> Database2 : stream all employees

EmployeeModule2 ..> SearchIndex2 : index employee

EmployeeModule2 ..> Database2 : stream all employees

EmployeeModule2 ..> EmployeeModule1 : reset index (delete + create)

EmployeeModule2 ..> Admin2 : stream all employees

@enduml
